---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Data Context
- Which module? (KLAWA / Musical Experience / AAT / PPPT / Merge)
- File format used? (.pdf / .csv / .itl.csv / .rsl.csv)
- Approximate number of files/participants?

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- R version: [e.g., 4.4.1]
- musicAnalysis version: [e.g., 0.0.0.9076]
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11]
